command:
echo "=== Temporarily stop .201 replica to force all traffic via .191 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 "sudo systemctl stop cloudflared && echo '.201 cloudflared stopped'"
sleep 5

echo "=== Send real Telegram message, watch .202 gateway.log ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Test via .191 only - Sakura reply online"}' >/dev/null
echo "sent via .191-only path, waiting 40s..."
sleep 40
echo "=== New gateway.log lines ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15
echo "(if inbound appears here, the .201 replica was the problem)"
REMOTE

echo ""
echo "=== Restart .201 replica ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 "sudo systemctl start cloudflared && echo '.201 restarted'"
